response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the expected live concert flow. The first song's ending, talk session, and second song 'Hakusen' are present.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON provided clues for song titles, but since it lacked complete transcriptions, manual transcription and translation were fully utilized for both the MC talk and the lyrics of 'Hakusen'.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with vocal starts and ends. Aggressive truncation was applied during fast lyrical transitions to prevent cascading delays, and longer sentences were split appropriately. No CC tags are included.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that,

subtitles.original: 始まりましたー！
subtitles.english: it has begun!

subtitles.original: 風真いろは生誕ライブ2026...
subtitles.english: Kazama Iroha Birthday Live 2026...

subtitles.original: スタート！みんな、こんばんはー！
subtitles.english: Start! Good evening, everyone!

subtitles.original: 見えてるー？
subtitles.english: Can you see me?

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、本日のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: Alright, so here is today's hashtag!

subtitles.original: こちらね、みんな、
subtitles.english: Please use this one, everyone,

subtitles.original: いっぱいポストして、いっぱいカッコいいとこ撮ってくださいね、頼むよ！
subtitles.english: post a lot and take lots of cool screenshots! I'm counting on you!

subtitles.original: この風真いろはがイケメンであることを
subtitles.english: To let the world know

subtitles.original: 世の中に知らしめられるのは、
subtitles.english: that Kazama Iroha is cool...

subtitles.original: お前たち、お前たちだけなので、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...is up to you guys! Only you can do it, so please help me out!

subtitles.original: はい、そして今回のねライブ、タイトルがついております！
subtitles.english: Yes, and this live concert has a title!

subtitles.original: Wind Trails というね、
subtitles.english: It's titled 'Wind Trails',

subtitles.original: タイトルがついておりますが、
subtitles.english: and as for this title,

subtitles.original: ま、そのまんま訳して、結構お気づきの方も多かったんですが、
subtitles.english: which, as many of you might have noticed from the literal translation,

subtitles.original: 風の軌跡というね、あの、意味を込めて付けさせていただき、
subtitles.english: carries the meaning of 'Trails of the Wind'.

subtitles.original: 今回ライブ色々、頑張って考えさせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I worked hard to plan various things for this live!

subtitles.original: なのでね、最後まで楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: So, I hope you enjoy it until the very end!

subtitles.original: そして、1曲目、かくれんぼ、歌わせていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: And for the first song, I performed 'Kakurenbo'!

subtitles.original: どうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: How did you like it?

subtitles.original: はい、そして今日、室内ライブだと思ったでしょ？
subtitles.english: Also, you probably thought today was an indoor live, right?

subtitles.original: 見てー！
subtitles.english: Look!

subtitles.original: 曲中に、ドームが開きましたー！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: During the song, the dome opened up! Yay!

subtitles.original: すごーい！
subtitles.english: Amazing!

subtitles.original: やっぱね、なかなか現地ライブって、できてもさ、
subtitles.english: After all, even when we do live concerts in person,

subtitles.original: 青空の下でなかなか歌うことってないので、
subtitles.english: we rarely get to sing under the blue sky.

subtitles.original: いつか、俺たちとお前たちの次元が交ざって、
subtitles.english: Maybe one day, our dimensions will merge

subtitles.original: 空の下で歌えるような世界が来るかもしれないけど、
subtitles.english: and we'll be able to sing under the real sky,

subtitles.original: やってみたくてね、今回は、空の下で歌うっていうこの演出やらせていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: but I really wanted to try it, so I went with this outdoor performance stage today!

subtitles.original: めっちゃいいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Isn't it great?

subtitles.original: で、ステージもめっちゃかっこいいんで、
subtitles.english: And the stage is super cool too!

subtitles.original: 今日ね、多分いっぱい見る機会あると思いますが、
subtitles.english: You'll probably see it a lot today,

subtitles.original: ゆっくり隅から隅まで
subtitles.english: but feel free to check out every single corner,

subtitles.original: アーカイブ勢もね、きっといると思うんで、
subtitles.english: including those watching the archive later.

subtitles.original: 本当に色んな細部こだわってるんで、細かく見てくださいね！
subtitles.english: We paid close attention to every detail, so please look closely!

subtitles.original: ということで、あ、お水飲んでいいですかね？
subtitles.english: With that said, oh, can I drink some water?

subtitles.original: お水を、う、う、やめろ！俺の頭を、う、やめ、う、
subtitles.english: Let me get some wa— Ah! Stop! My head— Hey, stop!

subtitles.original: 頭をいじくり回されて、ヘッドセットになりました。
subtitles.english: They messed with my head, and now I have a headset on.

subtitles.original: そして水が、水、用意してくれたんだよね？みんなに見える水。
subtitles.english: And they prepared this water for me, right? Water that everyone can see.

subtitles.original: うまい！
subtitles.english: Delicious!

subtitles.original: うますぎる！この、この振りはちょっと怒られそうだからもうできないけど、うますぎる！
subtitles.english: So good! I might get scolded for doing this pose, so I won't do it again, but it's so delicious!

subtitles.original: うまいな。
subtitles.english: So good.

subtitles.original: これで、あと1時間やるか、そういうわけにもいかないんで、
subtitles.english: Should we just do this for another hour? No, we can't do that.

subtitles.original: じゃ、1回ね、お水ちょっとお返しして、
subtitles.english: So, let me return the water first.

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、水分補給もさせてもらって、息も整えたんでね。
subtitles.english: Alright, now that I'm hydrated and caught my breath,

subtitles.original: はい、次の曲、早速やっていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: let's move on to the next song right away!

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲聞いてください。
subtitles.english: Please listen to the next song.

subtitles.original: 「白線」
subtitles.english: 'Hakusen'

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear sky,

subtitles.original: あの地平を超えて
subtitles.english: beyond that horizon.

subtitles.original: はい！はい！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: もっと！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: More! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: 始まりはちょっと軽い期待で
subtitles.english: It started with a little light expectation,

subtitles.original: そのカケラそっとポケットしまって
subtitles.english: gently slipping those fragments into my pocket.

subtitles.original: 屋上 遠い空の向こうを見てた
subtitles.english: On the rooftop, I looked beyond the distant sky.

subtitles.original: この足でどこに行けるかなって
subtitles.english: Wondering where these feet of mine could take me,

subtitles.original: わかってないけどわかってるんだ
subtitles.english: I didn't know, yet I knew deep down.

subtitles.original: 白昼の淡い月に手をのばした
subtitles.english: I reached my hand out to the pale moon in broad daylight.

subtitles.original: かすれたエコー でも答えはもう
subtitles.english: A faint echo, but the answer was already

subtitles.original: はじめからちゃんと持っていたんだよ
subtitles.english: something I had with me from the very start.

subtitles.original: メイビー この想いは
subtitles.english: Maybe this feeling...

subtitles.original: マスビー 熱を増して
subtitles.english: Must be growing hotter.

subtitles.original: ほらね、飛べるんだ
subtitles.english: See? I can fly.

subtitles.original: もっと高く 高くまで はばたいてみたい
subtitles.english: Higher and higher, I want to spread my wings.

subtitles.original: 今日に未来色の軌道描いて
subtitles.english: Drawing a future-colored trajectory on today,

subtitles.original: 地平の先まで
subtitles.english: to the edge of the horizon.

subtitles.original: 届かない歌はない 迷いはもうない
subtitles.english: There is no song that cannot reach, there are no more doubts.

subtitles.original: どんな世界も瞬間も揺るがない
subtitles.english: Unshaken in any world or moment,

subtitles.original: アイが在るから
subtitles.english: because love is here.

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear sky,

subtitles.original: 不安と期待とアンビバレント
subtitles.english: ambivalence of anxiety and anticipation.

subtitles.original: でも声はもう気づいてる
subtitles.english: But my voice has already realized,

subtitles.original: もっと高く高く高く高く 飛んでいける
subtitles.english: higher, higher, higher, higher, I can fly!

subtitles.original: 途切れ途切れの
subtitles.english: Fragmented and broken...
